name: CP2077 Tarot Style Bible v2 (print + brush)
core_rendering: flat posterized shapes, 2-3 tones per object max
thick black brush outlines + messy dry-brush fills
visible paper grain, paint splatter, smudges, worn edges
composition_rules: full-bleed illustration with thick black margin/negative space (no ornate HUD frame)
one dominant silhouette, background is abstract blocks/brush strokes (not detailed cityscape)
high contrast: big dark masses + 1-2 bright accents
palette_rules: per-card limited palette: black + 2-4 inks + 1 accent
avoid full-spectrum neon; use muted neon as paint, not as light sources
avoid smooth gradients; if transition needed -> hard edge or rough brush
glitch_rules: glitch = print artifacts: speckles, scratches, ink bleed, offset layers
no digital confetti/pixels unless extremely sparse
avoid: 3d render, raytracing, cinematic lighting, bloom, lens flare, HDR glow
